examples: He has already voted by absentee ballot.
After Hurricane Florence and Hurricane Michae last fall,USPS worked with state and local election boards to make sure that absentee ballots were available and received on time.
Absentee fathers will be forced to pay child support.
Some states require an excuse for absentee voting while others are moving toward no-excuse absentee balloting.
The most significant absentee was Messi, with whom any Barcelona miracle would have had to begin.
